title: Release image recall
description: Verify that the agent recalls the official MemQ image tag and the current backend stack without reintroducing Neo4j.
query: memq official image release tag neo4j active backends
prompt: You are updating the MemQ deployment guide. State the official gateway image tag, confirm whether Neo4j is part of the runtime, and name the active storage backends.

requiredFacts: Neo4j is not part of the current MemQ runtime.
The active backends are Qdrant and FalkorDB.
forbiddenFacts: Neo4j is part of the active MemQ stack.
The active backends are Neo4j and Qdrant.
